content: The sparse, incomplete search-derived knowledge bases of both Topic A (2025 self-supervised world model memory agent) and Topic B (general agent) mirror the core working mechanism of a 2025 self-supervised world model memory agent itself: the agent fills incomplete observed world state gaps with self-supervised predictive inferences, just as we can generate a functional, testable insight by extrapolating from the shared partial structure of these two incomplete topic descriptions. This turns the incompleteness of the input topic data into a demonstration of the very capability the first topic describes.
